name: |-Metal Sonic-| (Sonic The Hedgehog)
description:
“SONIC. DEAD OR ALIVE, IS M-M-MINE.”

Sonic’s metallic copy, with all of his moves and can do everything he can do, expect without the charm. He’s a cold blooded machine and when he has a task on hand, he’s gonna do it.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
